about.en: Creative problem solver with a full-stack skillset, passionate about mastering new technologies and crafting elegant solutions.
about.es: Solucionador de problemas creativo con habilidades full-stack, apasionado por dominar nuevas tecnologías y crear soluciones elegantes.

repositoryAbout.es: Perfil de GitHub, visita mis proyectos

en: Building and evolving the interfaces behind Movii's fintech platform with React, Next.js and Angular, from new business features to performance and code health, working under Scrum alongside UX/UI, backend and QA.
es: Construyendo y evolucionando las interfaces de la plataforma fintech de Movii con React, Next.js y Angular, desde nuevas funcionalidades de negocio hasta rendimiento y calidad de código, trabajando bajo Scrum junto a UX/UI, backend y QA.

en: Freelance engagement building and maintaining web applications for Banco Santander: a progressive Angular version migration, REST API integration, and a rewrite of the unit test suite that took coverage from 5% to 97%.
es: Proyecto freelance construyendo y manteniendo aplicaciones web para Banco Santander: una migración progresiva de versión de Angular, integración de APIs REST, y una reescritura de la suite de pruebas unitarias que llevó la cobertura del 5% al 97%.

en: Built and maintained REST APIs in Java with SQL databases, plus Angular (v8-11) frontends and Cordova mobile apps, supporting mobile banking projects for Banco FIE and Banco Panamá.
es: Construí y mantuve APIs REST en Java con bases de datos SQL, además de frontends en Angular (v8-11) y apps móviles con Cordova, dando soporte a proyectos de banca móvil para Banco FIE y Banco Panamá.

en: Developed web and mobile applications with Laravel, Angular and .NET for institutional and government platforms, designing REST APIs under SOLID/MVC and working directly with clients on requirements.
es: Desarrollé aplicaciones web y móviles con Laravel, Angular y .NET para plataformas institucionales y gubernamentales, diseñando APIs REST bajo SOLID/MVC y trabajando directamente con clientes en los requerimientos.

aiAndAutomation: AI-assisted code generation, documentation and testing

projects.title: Learn NextJs
projects.description: A Pokemon app built with Next.js, integrating the PokeAPI to show Pokemon data and details, with Redux for state management.

projects.title: Find Movies
projects.description: A movie app built with Angular 18 and Signals, integrating TheMovieDB API to show trending and popular content.

projects.title: OnlyShopping
projects.description: A shirt store web app built with React, integrating WhatsApp for direct customer contact and orders.

projects.title: MovieFilm
projects.description: A movie web app built with Next.js and server-side rendering, integrating TheMovieDB API to showcase trending and popular movies.

projects.title: Landing Warriors
projects.description: A web app built with Astro, featuring dynamic Mortal Kombat characters and animations, optimized for fast performance.

projects.title: Triqui Game
projects.description: A Tic-Tac-Toe game built with React, with interactive gameplay and state management for a smooth user experience.
